column2: grepl("_IgG2$",   feature) & grepl("^(ACT|DT|FHA|PRN|PT|TT)_", feature) ~ "IgG2 — core antigens",
grepl("_IgG2$",   feature) & grepl("^IPV",        feature)               ~ "IgG2 — IPV antigens",
caption = paste0("Table 2. Per-analyte-group sample sizes at the earlier (PregEarly) and later (MatBirth) visit. ",
"Each row is a set of features sharing the same coverage. ",
"The gap (MatBirth minus PregEarly) quantifies subjects present at the later visit ",
"but not the earlier one for that analyte group — subjects who ",
"cannot contribute to any paired change analysis for those features.")) %>% print()
